home.headline: Multi-Cloud Solutions Engineering Bootcamp (AWS & Google Cloud)
home.subtitle: An intensive hands-on bootcamp designed to develop multi-cloud engineering skills in realistic environments that mirror the job market.
home.aboutText: An intensive hands-on bootcamp designed to develop multi-cloud engineering skills (AWS and GCP) in realistic environments that mirror the job market. Participants learn to design and manage infrastructure across compute, networking, and containers, with a strong focus on security and identity management. The bootcamp also covers building highly available, scalable systems, monitoring, cost optimization, and backup strategies. The goal is to graduate engineers ready to design and operate secure, reliable cloud solutions and step directly into professional engineering roles.
objectives: Gain a comprehensive understanding of core cloud computing concepts, differentiate cloud infrastructure from traditional on-premises data centers, and choose the best platform per scenario.
Develop skills to design, deploy, and manage compute and storage resources, virtual machines, containers, and cloud databases using performance and efficiency best practices.
Master advanced cloud security concepts including IAM, encryption, data protection, and securing applications and services against common cyber threats.
Build skills in monitoring, log analysis, operations management, and performance/cost optimization to ensure stability and business continuity.
Use advanced tooling such as Cloud Shell/CLI, set up CI/CD pipelines, and deploy applications in real environments that simulate enterprise challenges.

support.title: Expert Support

1.text: This bootcamp gave me the practical skills I needed to transition into cloud engineering. The hands-on labs were invaluable.

2.text: Learning both AWS and GCP side by side helped me understand the cloud landscape much better. Highly recommended!

3.text: The instructors are knowledgeable and the curriculum is well-structured. I feel confident pursuing cloud certifications now.

prereq.q: What prerequisites do I need to enroll?
prereq.a: Basic understanding of IT concepts and programming fundamentals is helpful but not required. We start from the basics.

schedule.a: The bootcamp runs daily from 11:00 AM to 3:00 PM (Saudi Arabia time), from February 23 to May 14, 2026.

certificate.q: Will I receive a certificate upon completion?
certificate.a: Yes, you will receive a certificate of completion from Tuwaiq Academy upon successfully finishing the bootcamp.

materials.q: How can I access the learning materials?
materials.a: All learning materials including slides, labs, and extra resources are available through the Learning Materials section of this website.
